zh.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux於1040年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也。她和Humphrey de Bohun至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。她埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bayeaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Andre, Angelle, Antoine, Camille, Eulice.

variants.name: Badeau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Francois, Laurent, Normand.
variant of Badaud, from the ancient Germanic personal name Badwald, composed of the elements bad (from badhuo) ‘battle’ + wald ‘rule, power’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux was born in 1040, in Bayeux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Humphrey de Bohun. She was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux est née en 1040, à Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Humphrey de Bohun. Elleenterrée à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux wurde 1040 in Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hatte mit Humphrey de Bohun mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux è nata il nel 1040 nel Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Humphrey de Bohun. Fu sepolta a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Saint-Georges-de-Bohon, Manche, Basse-No: フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-ジョージェス-デ-ボhオン
ja.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeauxは1040年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスで生まれた。彼女はHumphrey de Bohunとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux(은)는 1040년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Humphrey de Bohun(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Aynho, Northamptonshire, England: Aynho, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux nasceu em 1040, em Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Humphrey de Bohun. Ela foi sepultada em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux родилась в 1040 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Humphrey de Bohun. Она была похоронена в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Ealgyph de Bayeaux nació en 1040, en Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Humphrey de Bohun. Fue sepultada en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
